title: Diagnosis
description: The agentic contract the DBA specialist returns to the SRE orchestrator across the A2A hop. One shape, enforced two ways: as the record_diagnosis MCP tool inputSchema on the declarative DBA, and as the pydantic output_schema on the BYO ADK DBA.

root_cause.description: What is actually broken, in one or two sentences.

fix.description: The exact remediation the on-call should apply.

runbook_url.description: Link to the matching runbook. Empty string if none applies.
